
OSA Residuals {data-navmenu="Diagnostics"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Summary Table

```{r osa_summary}
smry <- mv$osa_residuals$summary
smry$mean_z     <- round(smry$mean_z,  3)
smry$sd_z       <- round(smry$sd_z,    3)
smry$pGt2       <- round(smry$pGt2,    3)
smry$pGt3       <- round(smry$pGt3,    4)
smry$ks_p       <- round(smry$ks_p,    4)
smry$shapiro_p  <- round(smry$shapiro_p, 4)
knitr::kable(
  x         = smry,
  caption   = paste0(
    "OSA residual summary by fishery. ",
    "Under a correctly specified model z ~ N(0,1); ",
    "pGt2 and pGt3 should be ~0.046 and ~0.003."
  ),
  col.names = c("Fleet", "n", "Mean z", "SD z",
                "|z|>2", "|z|>3", "KS p", "Shapiro p"),
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

### QQ Plots

```{r osa_qq}
osa   <- mv$osa_residuals$osa
flts  <- unique(osa$fleet)
qq_plots <- lapply(flts, function(fl) {
  z_fl <- osa$z[osa$fleet == fl]
  z_fl <- z_fl[is.finite(z_fl)]
  if (length(z_fl) < 3L) return(plotly::plotly_empty())
  n    <- length(z_fl)
  q_th <- qnorm(ppoints(n))
  q_ob <- sort(z_fl)
  rng  <- range(c(q_th, q_ob), na.rm = TRUE)
  p <- plot_ly()
  p <- add_markers(
    p = p, x = q_th, y = q_ob,
    marker = list(color = "#1f77b4", size = 4,
                  line = list(color = "white", width = 0.5)),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    hovertemplate = "Theoretical: %{x:.3f}<br>Observed: %{y:.3f}<extra></extra>"
  )
  p <- add_trace(
    p = p, type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
    x = rng, y = rng,
    line = list(color = "#d62728", width = 1.5, dash = "dash"),
    showlegend = FALSE, hoverinfo = "skip"
  )
  lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
  lay$xaxis$title <- "Theoretical N(0,1)"
  lay$yaxis$title <- "OSA residual"
  lay$annotations <- list(mv_top_label(label = fl))
  do.call(layout, c(list(p = p), lay))
})
if (length(qq_plots) > 1L) {
  n_col <- min(length(qq_plots), 3L)
  n_row <- ceiling(length(qq_plots) / n_col)
  p_out <- do.call(subplot, c(qq_plots, list(
    nrows = n_row, shareX = TRUE, shareY = TRUE,
    titleX = TRUE, titleY = TRUE, margin = 0.06
  )))
  modelVis::mv_config(p = layout(p = p_out, showlegend = FALSE))
} else if (length(qq_plots) == 1L) {
  modelVis::mv_config(p = qq_plots[[1L]])
}
```

### Residual Bubbles

```{r osa_bubble}
pb  <- mv$osa_residuals$perBin
pb  <- pb[is.finite(pb$z), , drop = FALSE]
pb$residual <- pb$z
flts <- unique(pb$fleet)
bub_plots <- lapply(flts, function(fl) {
  sub <- pb[pb$fleet == fl, , drop = FALSE]
  if (nrow(sub) == 0L) return(plotly::plotly_empty())
  mv_plot_bubble(
    df    = sub,
    x_col = "year",
    y_col = "age",
    xlab  = "Year",
    ylab  = "Age",
    title = fl
  )
})
if (length(bub_plots) > 0L)
  htmltools::tagList(bub_plots)
```

### Histograms

```{r osa_hist}
osa  <- mv$osa_residuals$osa
flts <- unique(osa$fleet)
z_seq <- seq(-4, 4, length.out = 100)
norm_y <- dnorm(z_seq)
hist_plots <- lapply(flts, function(fl) {
  z_fl <- osa$z[osa$fleet == fl]
  z_fl <- z_fl[is.finite(z_fl)]
  if (length(z_fl) < 3L) return(plotly::plotly_empty())
  p <- plot_ly()
  p <- add_histogram(
    p = p, x = z_fl,
    histnorm = "probability density",
    marker = list(color = "rgba(31,119,180,0.5)",
                  line = list(color = "white", width = 0.5)),
    name = "Observed", showlegend = FALSE,
    hovertemplate = "%{x:.2f}: %{y:.4f}<extra></extra>"
  )
  p <- add_trace(
    p = p, type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
    x = z_seq, y = norm_y,
    line = list(color = "#d62728", width = 1.5),
    name = "N(0,1)", showlegend = FALSE,
    hoverinfo = "skip"
  )
  pct_gt2 <- round(100 * mean(abs(z_fl) > 2, na.rm = TRUE), 1)
  lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
  lay$xaxis$title <- "OSA residual"
  lay$yaxis$title <- "Density"
  lay$annotations <- list(
    mv_top_label(label = fl),
    list(x = 0.98, y = 0.96, xref = "paper", yref = "paper",
         text = paste0("|z| > 2: ", pct_gt2, "%"),
         showarrow = FALSE, xanchor = "right",
         font = list(size = 10),
         bgcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.8)")
  )
  do.call(layout, c(list(p = p), lay))
})
if (length(hist_plots) > 1L) {
  n_col <- min(length(hist_plots), 3L)
  n_row <- ceiling(length(hist_plots) / n_col)
  p_out <- do.call(subplot, c(hist_plots, list(
    nrows = n_row, shareX = TRUE, shareY = FALSE,
    titleX = TRUE, titleY = TRUE, margin = 0.06
  )))
  modelVis::mv_config(p = layout(p = p_out, showlegend = FALSE))
} else if (length(hist_plots) == 1L) {
  modelVis::mv_config(p = hist_plots[[1L]])
}
```
